name: CLX - MGA Insurance Quote Manual v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. mga_principal/admin/advisor session. Records a manually-received carrier quote in carrier_quotes.

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "vertical_id": "insurance", "event_type": "carrier_quote_received", "event_data": {{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Check Role').first().json.payload.lead_id, carrier_id: $('Check Role').first().json.payload.carrier_id, source: 'manual', amount_cents: $('Check Role').first().json.payload.quote_amount_cents }) }}, "actor_user_id": "{{ $('Check Role').first().json.actor_id }}" }
